If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nTo know when a postponed game will be played, please check the home team's schedule on MLB.com for the listed team and look for the game described as a makeup game.\n\nThe primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, or ends in a tie, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, or ends in a tie, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.", "assets_ids":["94102625002486943132424778154449643525225555252961994934818977654999616619356", "17356810545141606452255791576476759638110954082989670849542249361000406436974"], "outcomes":["Cincinnati Reds", "Milwaukee Brewers"], "event_message":{"id":"636777", "ticker":"mlb-cin-mil-2026-07-02", "slug":"mlb-cin-mil-2026-07-02", "title":"Cincinnati Reds vs. Milwaukee Brewers", "description":"In the upcoming MLB game between the Cincinnati Reds and Milwaukee Brewers, scheduled for July 2 at 2:10PM ET:\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Cincinnati Reds\" if the Cincinnati Reds win the game.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Milwaukee Brewers\" if the Milwaukee Brewers win the game.\n\nIf the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. {"id":"2691868", "question":"Will there be a run scored in the first inning?: Detroit Tigers vs. Texas Rangers", "market":"0x6a2ada657f0297db1db8b6a71d20a0000145d39ea3fb5230ce1901eb206e5e20", "slug":"mlb-det-tex-2026-07-02-nrfi", "description":"In the upcoming MLB game between the Detroit Tigers and Texas Rangers, scheduled for July 2 at 8:05 PM ET:\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Yes\" if at least one run is scored in the 1st inning by either the Detroit Tigers or Texas Rangers.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"No\" if no runs are scored in the 1st inning by either team.\n\nIf the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nTo know when a postponed game will be played, please check the home team's schedule on MLB.com for the listed team and look for the game described as a makeup game.\n\nThe primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.", "assets_ids":["57710329835573512118965135175674967220345484961323509908744903502069630496005", "91497896756470521504820591618059035146821409901577456622498896672361310247835"], "outcomes":["Yes", "No"], "event_message":{"id":"636782", "ticker":"mlb-det-tex-2026-07-02", "slug":"mlb-det-tex-2026-07-02", "title":"Detroit Tigers vs. Texas Rangers", "description":"In the upcoming MLB game between the Detroit Tigers and Texas Rangers, scheduled for July 2 at 8:05PM ET:\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Detroit Tigers\" if the Detroit Tigers win the game.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Texas Rangers\" if the Texas Rangers win the game.\n\nIf the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, or ends in a tie, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe primary resolution source for this market is the official final statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead."}, "timestamp":"1782479039058", "event_type":"new_market", "tags":[], "condition_id":"0x6a2ada657f0297db1db8b6a71d20a0000145d39ea3fb5230ce1901eb206e5e20", "active":false, "clob_token_ids":["57710329835573512118965135175674967220345484961323509908744903502069630496005", "91497896756470521504820591618059035146821409901577456622498896672361310247835"], "sports_market_type":"nrfi", "line":"", "game_start_time":"2026-07-03 00:05:00+00", "order_price_min_tick_size":"0.01", "group_item_title":"NRFI", "taker_base_fee":"1000", "fees_enabled":true, "fee_schedule":{"exponent":"1", "rate":"0.03", "taker_only":true, "rebate_rate":"0.25"}}

{"id":"2691880", "question":"Total Kills Over/Under 60.5 in Game 1?", "market":"0x6ea502bc507ec51f3889c29cc400fcb1f91352d1d87ba8d8f9cf63a33e323ba9", "slug":"dota2-yes-modus-2026-06-26-game1-kill-over-60pt5", "description":"In the upcoming Lower bracket round 2 match between Yellow Submarine and MODUS in the The International Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET:\n\nThis market is about the total kills in Game 1.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Over\" if the total kills in Game 1 is 61 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to \"Under\".\n\nIf the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.\n\nIf Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.\n\nIf Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.\n\nIf Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.\n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\n\nIn Dota 2, a \"kill\" for markets like team total kills, kill handicap, and interval kills is counted when an enemy hero dies and the game awards a hero kill event to the opposing team's score, which is the number shown on the in-game scoreboard and tracked in scoreboard feeds as team kills. In practical terms, this includes any enemy hero death that increments a team's kill score, regardless of who got the last hit, including situations where the victim dies to creeps, a tower, or neutrals as long as the kill is still credited to the enemy team. It does not include denies, such as killing your own allied units, and it also does not include building or objective destructions like towers, barracks, or Roshan, since those are tracked separately from kills. Assists also do not count as kills, because they are recorded as a separate player stat and multiple players can assist on a single kill.", "assets_ids":["88831771019444109604955440480087898291401701367804891150036353504657413958571", "94106388259502033077094140430111558952610862604701426133765850094399464602216"], "outcomes":["Over", "Under"], "event_message":{"id":"630232", "ticker":"dota2-yes-modus-2026-06-26", "slug":"dota2-yes-modus-2026-06-26", "title":"Dota 2: Yellow Submarine vs MODUS (BO3) - The International Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs", "description":"This market refers to the Dota 2 Lower bracket round 2 match between Yellow Submarine and MODUS in the The International Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 10:00AM ET.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Yellow Submarine\" if Yellow Submarine win the match against MODUS.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"MODUS\" if MODUS win the match against Yellow Submarine.\n\nIf the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nIf the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. \n\nIf the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\nIn cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50."}, "timestamp":"1782479100690", "event_type":"new_market", "tags":[], "condition_id":"0x6ea502bc507ec51f3889c29cc400fcb1f91352d1d87ba8d8f9cf63a33e323ba9", "active":false, "clob_token_ids":["88831771019444109604955440480087898291401701367804891150036353504657413958571", "94106388259502033077094140430111558952610862604701426133765850094399464602216"], "sports_market_type":"kill_over_under_game", "line":"60.5", "game_start_time":"2026-06-26 13:00:00+00", "order_price_min_tick_size":"0.01", "group_item_title":"Total Kills Over/Under 60.5 in Game 1?", "taker_base_fee":"1000", "fees_enabled":true, "fee_schedule":{"exponent":"1", "rate":"0.03", "taker_only":true, "rebate_rate":"0.25"}}

{"id":"2691896", "question":"Map 1 Rounds Handicap: Johnny Speeds (-9.5) vs ReThink (+9.5)", "market":"0x8695c54d13fad1113094cc16c367ae756ff05a26e5c7be5ea5b7ed781f3e8df4", "slug":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26-game1-round-handicap-js1-9pt5", "description":"This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Johnny Speeds and ReThink in the Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET. This market is decided solely by the round score of Map 1 of this match, and is independent of which team wins Map 1 or the overall match.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Johnny Speeds\" if Johnny Speeds wins Map 1 by 10 or more rounds, including any overtime (i.e. Johnny Speeds's round total on Map 1 exceeds ReThink's by 10 or more). Otherwise, this market will resolve to \"ReThink\".\n\nMap 1 must be played to completion, with a final round score determined by rounds actually played, for this market to resolve to a team. If Map 1 is completed in this way, the market resolves on that round score regardless of how the remainder of the match concludes (including any later forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default). If Map 1 is not played at all, is not played to completion, or is decided by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default rather than by rounds played to a conclusion, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without Map 1 being completed, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\nIn cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. {"id":"2691897", "question":"Map 1 Total Rounds: Over/Under 24.5", "market":"0xfc51b5c48dccfdf234e5e3f6bf4de8a30d6c425580b44093fc312ee350c2da84", "slug":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26-game1-round-total-24pt5", "description":"This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Johnny Speeds and ReThink in the Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET. This market is decided solely by the total number of rounds played within Map 1 of this match (the combined round score of both teams on that single map), and is independent of which team wins Map 1 or the overall match.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Over\" if the combined number of rounds played by both teams on Map 1, including any overtime, is greater than 24.5. This market will resolve to \"Under\" if the combined number of rounds played is less than 24.5. If the combined number of rounds played is exactly 24.5, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nMap 1 must be played to completion, with a final round score determined by rounds actually played, for this market to resolve to \"Over\" or \"Under\". If Map 1 is completed in this way, the market resolves on that round total regardless of how the remainder of the match concludes (including any later forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default). If Map 1 is not played at all, is not played to completion, or is decided by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default rather than by rounds played to a conclusion, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without Map 1 being completed, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead, including video evidence.", "assets_ids":["101403355567068301504274603921281182274618763871851439645194041696914963563421", "54169790343298847628891277572898492121511326782054467330593823778881528707047"], "outcomes":["Over", "Under"], "event_message":{"id":"635918", "ticker":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26", "slug":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26", "title":"Counter-Strike: Johnny Speeds vs ReThink (BO3) - Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs", "description":"This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket semifinal 2 match between Johnny Speeds and ReThink in the Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Johnny Speeds\" if Johnny Speeds win the match against ReThink.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"ReThink\" if ReThink win the match against Johnny Speeds.\n\nIf the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nIf the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. \n\nIf the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\nIn cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50."}, "timestamp":"1782479579313", "event_type":"new_market", "tags":[], "condition_id":"0xfc51b5c48dccfdf234e5e3f6bf4de8a30d6c425580b44093fc312ee350c2da84", "active":false, "clob_token_ids":["101403355567068301504274603921281182274618763871851439645194041696914963563421", "54169790343298847628891277572898492121511326782054467330593823778881528707047"], "sports_market_type":"round_over_under_game_1", "line":"24.5", "game_start_time":"2026-06-26 13:00:00+00", "order_price_min_tick_size":"0.01", "group_item_title":"Map 1 Total Rounds: Over/Under 24.5", "taker_base_fee":"1000", "fees_enabled":true, "fee_schedule":{"exponent":"1", "rate":"0.03", "taker_only":true, "rebate_rate":"0.25"}}
{"id":"2691895", "question":"Map 1 Rounds Handicap: Johnny Speeds (-3.5) vs ReThink (+3.5)", "market":"0x05aaaaa8cc617eb35f2b650b01570173cd6093675561b16e096c514a90296c31", "slug":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26-game1-round-handicap-js1-3pt5", "description":"This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Johnny Speeds and ReThink in the Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET. This market is decided solely by the round score of Map 1 of this match, and is independent of which team wins Map 1 or the overall match.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Johnny Speeds\" if Johnny Speeds wins Map 1 by 4 or more rounds, including any overtime (i.e. Johnny Speeds's round total on Map 1 exceeds ReThink's by 4 or more). Otherwise, this market will resolve to \"ReThink\".\n\nMap 1 must be played to completion, with a final round score determined by rounds actually played, for this market to resolve to a team. If Map 1 is completed in this way, the market resolves on that round score regardless of how the remainder of the match concludes (including any later forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default). If Map 1 is not played at all, is not played to completion, or is decided by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default rather than by rounds played to a conclusion, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without Map 1 being completed, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead, including video evidence.", "assets_ids":["73900522758127570290970390376948063168904582603934792156930934093519201709344", "58291592503170507235666263838687680781993212038388121607091193932566044605302"], "outcomes":["Johnny Speeds", "ReThink"], "event_message":{"id":"635918", "ticker":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26", "slug":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26", "title":"Counter-Strike: Johnny Speeds vs ReThink (BO3) - Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs", "description":"This market refers to the Counter-Strike Upper bracket semifinal 2 match between Johnny Speeds and ReThink in the Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Johnny Speeds\" if Johnny Speeds win the match against ReThink.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"ReThink\" if ReThink win the match against Johnny Speeds.\n\nIf the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nIf the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. \n\nIf the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\nIn cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50."}, "timestamp":"1782479581166", "event_type":"new_market", "tags":[], "condition_id":"0x05aaaaa8cc617eb35f2b650b01570173cd6093675561b16e096c514a90296c31", "active":false, "clob_token_ids":["73900522758127570290970390376948063168904582603934792156930934093519201709344", "58291592503170507235666263838687680781993212038388121607091193932566044605302"], "sports_market_type":"round_handicap_game_1", "line":"-3.5", "game_start_time":"2026-06-26 13:00:00+00", "order_price_min_tick_size":"0.01", "group_item_title":"Map 1 Rounds Handicap: Johnny Speeds (-3.5) vs ReThink (+3.5)", "taker_base_fee":"1000", "fees_enabled":true, "fee_schedule":{"exponent":"1", "rate":"0.03", "taker_only":true, "rebate_rate":"0.25"}}
{"id":"2691908", "question":"Total Kills Over/Under 45.5 in Game 1?", "market":"0x09d96d207d0c9924d3e433c91a14697867a71c55480172cc73c3801ce369e29e", "slug":"dota2-yes-modus-2026-06-26-game1-kill-over-45pt5", "description":"In the upcoming Lower bracket round 2 match between Yellow Submarine and MODUS in the The International Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET:\n\nThis market is about the total kills in Game 1.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Over\" if the total kills in Game 1 is 46 or more. Otherwise, it will resolve to \"Under\".\n\nIf the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date, this market will resolve to 50-50.\n\nIf Game 1 is never played due to forfeit, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50.\n\nIf Game 1 begins but is not completed, this market will resolve to 50-50.\n\nIf Game 1 is remade, resolution will be based on the total kills in the remade game only.\n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. However, if https://www.dotabuff.com has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\n\nIn Dota 2, a \"kill\" for markets like team total kills, kill handicap, and interval kills is counted when an enemy hero dies and the game awards a hero kill event to the opposing team's score, which is the number shown on the in-game scoreboard and tracked in scoreboard feeds as team kills. In practical terms, this includes any enemy hero death that increments a team's kill score, regardless of who got the last hit, including situations where the victim dies to creeps, a tower, or neutrals as long as the kill is still credited to the enemy team. It does not include denies, such as killing your own allied units, and it also does not include building or objective destructions like towers, barracks, or Roshan, since those are tracked separately from kills. Assists also do not count as kills, because they are recorded as a separate player stat and multiple players can assist on a single kill.", "assets_ids":["5084754425140802062020592301298072633511996138272899486714056886057624502139", "72942378788345824553632687513515761918052149066501554629866244077392952771838"], "outcomes":["Over", "Under"], "event_message":{"id":"630232", "ticker":"dota2-yes-modus-2026-06-26", "slug":"dota2-yes-modus-2026-06-26", "title":"Dota 2: Yellow Submarine vs MODUS (BO3) - The International Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs", "description":"This market refers to the Dota 2 Lower bracket round 2 match between Yellow Submarine and MODUS in the The International Europe Closed Qualifier Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 10:00AM ET.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Yellow Submarine\" if Yellow Submarine win the match against MODUS.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"MODUS\" if MODUS win the match against Yellow Submarine.\n\nIf the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nIf the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. \n\nIf the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. \n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.dotabuff.com. {"id":"2691916", "question":"Map 1 Total Rounds: Over/Under 21.5", "market":"0xc5b599f3fca47031d8c17e6589486079d14d5111c992d3580a7a7846ce702736", "slug":"cs2-js1-rt1-2026-06-26-game1-round-total-21pt5", "description":"This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Johnny Speeds and ReThink in the Svenska CS-Ligan Playoffs, initially scheduled for June 26 at 9:00AM ET. This market is decided solely by the total number of rounds played within Map 1 of this match (the combined round score of both teams on that single map), and is independent of which team wins Map 1 or the overall match.\n\nThis market will resolve to \"Over\" if the combined number of rounds played by both teams on Map 1, including any overtime, is greater than 21.5. This market will resolve to \"Under\" if the combined number of rounds played is less than 21.5. If the combined number of rounds played is exactly 21.5, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nMap 1 must be played to completion, with a final round score determined by rounds actually played, for this market to resolve to \"Over\" or \"Under\". If Map 1 is completed in this way, the market resolves on that round total regardless of how the remainder of the match concludes (including any later forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default). If Map 1 is not played at all, is not played to completion, or is decided by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default rather than by rounds played to a conclusion, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without Map 1 being completed, this market will resolve 50-50.\n\nThe resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.\n\nIn cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50."}, "timestamp":"1782480180686", "event_type":"new_market", "tags":[], "condition_id":"0xc5b599f3fca47031d8c17e6589486079d14d5111c992d3580a7a7846ce702736", "active":false, "clob_token_ids":["15255274068366883698250002663366217170412560162878317791118210057044393822027", "41508192265733493683908493334173556786468247693731716080700562832640745485781"], "sports_market_type":"round_over_under_game_1", "line":"21.5", "game_start_time":"2026-06-26 13:00:00+00", "order_price_min_tick_size":"0.01", "group_item_title":"Map 1 Total Rounds: Over/Under 21.5", "taker_base_fee":"1000", "fees_enabled":true, "fee_schedule":{"exponent":"1", "rate":"0.03", "taker_only":true, "rebate_rate":"0.25"}}
